name: Chili-Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Chiles; Chopped (sweet green chiles or jalapenos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cheese, peppers, and mayonnaise until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture on the cut surface of a sliced French bread loaf.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes.
4. Cut into thick slices and serve hot.
